prestazioni: Engine: EJ22E (2.2L SOHC 16V) or EJ251 (2.5L SOHC 16V) – Replace stock internals with forged pistons (JE 2618M, 8.5:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods (EAG-54000B) for 300+ WHP reliability on E85.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo (0.63 A/R, 60 trim) with a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate manifold (Perrin Performance) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium blow-off valve (TOMEI-PON-TIV).

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (2x Walbro 450 LPH) and a Cobb Tuning Accessport (AP-SUB-002) for custom E85 flex-fuel mapping with 22 psi peak boost.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 (Pandem) widebody conversion with custom-fabricated aluminum fender flares (2.5-inch wider than OEM) and carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon CF-SUB-IM-01).

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (SUB-KA4-N1) with custom valving for 1.5-inch lowered ride height, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (BMR79X) and poly bushings (Whiteline W51410).
Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (17x9 +35 ET) with Nitto NT05R tires (245/40/17) and custom hub-centric spacers (5mm, Project Kics R40) for flush fitment.
